mechanism: High index concentration in long-duration, asset-light stocks makes the S&P 500 effectively a duration asset during commodity inflation. This creates hidden correlation with rate-sensitive assets (bonds, EM debt), amplifying the correlation concentration problem for portfolios that use index allocations.
regime_dependence: Proportional to index concentration level (~35% in top 10 as of 2025); stronger when commodity inflation operates primarily through the discount rate channel rather than COGS
